subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I bear witness that Thou hast sent down the proof, and made manifest the path, and hast clarified for Thy servants that which was hidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اشهد انک انزلت الدلیل و اظهرت السبیل و اوضحت لعبادک ما کان مستورا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
